title: GDP growth beats expectations
text: US GDP grew faster than analysts expected, supporting investor demand for cyclical stocks.

title: Inflation slows in April
text: Consumer inflation slowed for the second month, increasing expectations of a softer monetary policy path.

title: Central bank keeps key rate unchanged
text: The central bank kept the policy rate unchanged and warned that price pressure remains elevated.

title: Oil prices decline after inventory report
text: Oil prices fell after inventories rose more than expected, weighing on energy exporters.

title: Retail sales rise moderately
text: Retail sales increased moderately as households continued spending on services and durable goods.

title: Manufacturing PMI weakens
text: Manufacturing PMI moved below the neutral threshold, signaling weaker industrial activity.

title: Currency stabilizes after intervention
text: The national currency stabilized after the regulator announced additional liquidity operations.

title: Unemployment rate remains low
text: The unemployment rate stayed near historical lows, supporting wage growth and domestic demand.

title: Export orders contract
text: Export orders declined as external demand weakened across major trading partners.

title: Bond yields fall on rate expectations
text: Government bond yields declined as investors priced in potential rate cuts later this year.
